refnamediv.refpurpose: Aggregate function that clusters input geometries into connected sets.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: An aggregate function that returns an array of GeometryCollections partitioning the input geometries into connected clusters that are disjoint. Each geometry in a cluster intersects at least one other geometry in the cluster, and does not intersect any geometry in other clusters.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
WITH testdata AS (SELECT unnest(ARRAY['LINESTRING (0 0, 1 1)'::geometry, 'LINESTRING (5 5, 4 4)'::geometry, 'LINESTRING (6 6, 7 7)'::geometry, 'LINESTRING (0 0, -1 -1)'::geometry, 'POLYGON ((0 0, 4 0, 4 4, 0 4, 0 0))'::geometry]) AS geom)
SELECT ST_AsText(unnest(ST_ClusterIntersecting(geom))) FROM testdata;
--result
st_astext --------- GEOMETRYCOLLECTION(LINESTRING(0 0,1 1),LINESTRING(5 5,4 4),LINESTRING(0 0,-1 -1),POLYGON((0 0,4 0,4 4,0 4,0 0))) GEOMETRYCOLLECTION(LINESTRING(6 6,7 7))
